About Me

Built for Systems.
Called to Serve.

I am a results-driven Executive VA and Project Coordinator with a background in quality assurance and operations. My work sits at the intersection of smart systems and genuine impact, building automated workflows, digital products, and communities that help people do their best work.

As the founder of Arisewoman, I mentor women navigating career pivots and personal transformation. I write and create from lived experience, with an unwavering belief that clarity, systems, and community can change someone's trajectory.

⚙️
Systems Builder
I design automation workflows that eliminate manual bottlenecks and scale operations intelligently.
🌍
Community Founder
Arisewoman serves a global audience of women seeking career and personal growth, especially in Nigeria.
🤖
AI Product Creator
I build and ship AI-powered apps and digital guides that solve real problems for real people.
I do not just build workflows. I build the systems that give people their time back, so they can show up fully for what matters.

Portfolio

Selected Projects

Real work, real tools, real results. Every screenshot below is from a live workflow, system, or automation I designed and delivered.

Workflow Automation • AutoTech
IT Asset Request & Approval Workflow
Designed and implemented a fully automated end-to-end system that handles IT asset requests, routes them through manager approval, and logs all records automatically, eliminating manual processing entirely using Google Forms, Zapier, and Airtable.
Complete Zapier automation map with approval routing & conditional paths
IT Asset Request Form (Google Forms)
Airtable: Auto-populated IT Requests database
Zapier: Google Forms trigger feeding Airtable records
Client onboarding automation: Google Forms to Airtable
40-60% less manual data entry Automated approval routing Real-time record creation Google Forms + Zapier + Airtable
Project Management • Executive VA
Team Project Coordination & Task Management
Built and managed structured Notion workspaces for team coordination across multiple concurrent projects, including content calendars, task trackers with priority levels, board views, and meeting overviews with assigned deliverables.
Dawn Project Tracker: Task list with priorities, assignees & status
Board view: Not started / In progress / Done kanban layout
Content Planning Dashboard for team
Team Meeting Overview with assignments & notes
n8n: Real Estate Lead Onboarding System
10-member team coordination Notion workspaces Multi-project oversight n8n automation
